sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 17:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 17:1
items.html: The refinement of the screen in Tabur of the first expansion until it became refined in equivalence of form to the screen of Malchut of the Rosh is considered that the screen of Tabur rose to the Rosh. As it ascends in the order of degrees of the ten Sefirot of the Guf, the screen is incorporated with all the records in the Guf. The two records of male and female of Keter are the upper ones among them, containing all of them. Hence, when that screen rose to the Rosh, it brought these records with it, meaning ZON of Keter. Thus, the refinement of the screen of the first expansion caused ZON of Keter to rise up to the Rosh. (Inner Light, Item‎ 4)
